summary: The CI 'Run prettier' step failed because a yarn run exited with a non‑zero status while processing source files, causing the job to fail.
root_cause: A yarn-run formatting step (prettier) exited with code 1, indicating formatting issues were detected in source files such as packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js and compiler/packages/babel-plugin-react-compiler/src/ReactiveScopes/CodegenReactiveFunction.ts.

evidence.reason: This file path was listed in the CI output, implying it was touched by the formatting step.
This TypeScript file path was listed in the CI output, implying it was part of the run that failed.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: Shows the yarn command (the prettier step) terminated with a non-zero exit code, which caused the job to fail.

evidence.quote: info Visit https://yarnpkg.com/en/docs/cli/run for documentation about this command.
evidence.reason: Indicates the failing command was run via yarn, consistent with a yarn-run prettier script failing.

suggested_fix: Run the project's prettier check locally (e.g. the yarn run script used by CI) to see the formatting failures, then run prettier --write (or the project's fix command) on the listed files and commit the changes so the CI formatting check passes.
